PowerShell(cd c:\\xampp\\htdocs\\sicapin-laravel; $src = "storage\\app\\private\\public\\sertifikat"; $dst = "storage\\app\\public\\sertifikat"; if \(Test-Path $src\) { $files = Get-ChildItem $src -File; $count = 0; foreach \($f in $files\) { $target = Join-Path $dst $f.Name; if \(-not \(Test-Path $target\)\) { Move-Item $f.FullName $target; $count++ } }; "Moved $count files" } else { "Source dir not found" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\xampp\\htdocs\\sicapin-laravel; @\("", "sertifikat", "sertifikat/rekap", "sertifikat/rekap-jenis", "sertifikat/pending", "sertifikat/download", "sertifikat/upload", "kalender", "comparison", "pegawai", "jenis-pelatihan", "profile", "sertifikat/live-search?q=test", "search?q=test", "sertifikat/cetak-pribadi"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/sicapin-laravel/public/$_" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "$_ => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; if \($code\) { "$_ => $code" } else { "$_ => ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })
